problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Combining Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
